_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and evaluating prompt engineering strategies, including few-shot prompting, chain-of-thought prompting, and structured output generation.
comments: NICE skill intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Skill AI-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-005 (LS, cosine: 0.487), OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.464).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.6/10 (raw 0.561). Shared vocabulary: [skill]. NICE-only terms [feedback, incorporating] vs WIDAI-only terms [chain, designing, engineering, evaluating, few, generation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.868 (P=0.894, R=0.844). P exceeds R by 0.050 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Skill in incorporating feedback" and "Skill in designing and evaluating prompt engineering strategies, including few-s" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.523 ≈ STS 0.561 (gap 0.038). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [skill] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [skill]. NICE-only: [feedback, incorporating]. WIDAI-only: [chain, designing, engineering, evaluating, few, generation].
